title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Nexus Malls - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Nexus Malls - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Nexus Malls, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Sales Manager for our Pune operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Nexus Malls:
Nexus Malls is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Title Search

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nexus Malls!
